# Repository description & topics (GitHub About)

Use the text below in your GitHub repo **About** section (edit next to the description, and add **Topics**).

---

## Short description (English)

**Lightweight, mobile-first todo checklist PWA — React, TypeScript, Vite. Offline-ready with drag-and-drop reordering and light/dark theme.**

---

## Topics / Keywords

Use these as GitHub repository topics (comma-separated or one per line when adding):

- `pwa`
- `react`
- `typescript`
- `vite`
- `todo`
- `checklist`
- `offline`
- `tailwindcss`
- `progressive-web-app`
- `local-storage`

Optional extras:

- `daisyui`
- `drag-and-drop`
- `mobile-first`
